name: Commander Legends

draft.notes: 20-card pack: 13 commons, 3 uncommons, 1 rare, 2 legendary cards, 1 guaranteed foil, plus an ad card. The 2 legend slots may be uncommon/rare/mythic legendaries; at most 1 mythic. If The Prismatic Piper (special rarity) appears it comes after the foil and displaces a common.

statedRates: Average ~1.5 non-legendary uncommons per pack; at most 1 mythic per pack; can have two rares.
sourceNotes: Extra-large Commander draft set with 20-card boosters (2 legendary slots) and a guaranteed foil. 24 packs per box. One card of special rarity (The Prismatic Piper). An additional 32 reprinted legendaries appear in draft boosters only with foil-etched treatment. Printed in USA and Belgium; figures from US Pack Anatomy.
